items.name: ChatGPT
items.description: OpenAI's flagship product. GPT-4o/o3 supports text, image, and voice multimodal interaction.

items.name: Claude
items.description: By Anthropic. Opus/Sonnet series excels at long-form understanding, code generation, and deep reasoning.

items.name: Gemini
items.description: By Google. Native multimodal with ultra-long context. Deep Research for direction judgment and decision support.

items.name: DeepSeek
items.description: Chinese open-source LLM with strong reasoning capabilities and excellent cost-performance ratio.

items.name: Perplexity
items.description: AI-powered search engine providing cited real-time answers — great for quick research.

items.name: Kimi
items.description: By Moonshot AI. Ultra-long context support, excels at processing lengthy documents and complex analysis.

items.name: Doubao
items.description: ByteDance's AI chat assistant with multimodal interaction, rich plugin ecosystem, and seamless Chinese support.

items.name: Claude Code
items.description: Anthropic's AI coding CLI — the hottest Vibe Coding tool of 2026, supports Agent-level autonomous development.

items.name: Cursor
items.description: AI-native code editor with built-in assistant, multi-model switching, and smart code completion.

items.name: Windsurf
items.description: By Codeium. Cascade feature enables multi-step Agent-style programming, easy to get started.

items.name: Trae
items.description: Free AI IDE by ByteDance with built-in Claude/GPT models. Zero barrier to entry.

items.name: v0.dev
items.description: Vercel's AI UI generator — describe in natural language, get React component code.

items.name: Bolt.new
items.description: In-browser full-stack AI dev environment. One sentence to generate a complete app.

items.name: Lovable
items.description: AI full-stack platform — natural language to complete apps with database and auth.

items.name: Replit Agent
items.description: Replit's AI Agent for full automation from requirements to deployment, one-click launch.

items.name: Codex
items.description: OpenAI's AI coding agent that autonomously writes, tests, and debugs code in a sandboxed environment.

items.name: OpenClaw
items.description: AI Agent skills marketplace. Skills aggregation for Claude Code/Cursor with 53,000+ tools.

items.name: Manus
items.description: General-purpose AI Agent — autonomous web browsing, coding, file processing for complex task automation.

items.name: Devin
items.description: By Cognition. AI software engineer that independently handles the full dev workflow from requirements to commits.

items.name: Claude Code
items.description: Anthropic's terminal-based AI coding agent — autonomously reads/writes code, runs commands, and searches files. The most powerful coding agent of 2026.

items.name: APIMart
items.description: AI proxy for image & video generation models. Affordable API access to creative AI. X: @APIMart_

items.name: Yunwu AI
items.description: AI proxy aggregating multiple models for image and video generation APIs.

items.name: AiGoCode
items.description: Code-focused AI proxy service, stable and reliable for daily programming. X: @sitinme

items.name: PipeLLM
items.description: Code-focused AI proxy with multi-model switching, great for developers. X: @Cydiar404

items.name: AI Naibah Hub
items.description: Codex model proxy service by AI Naibah, focused on OpenAI Codex series APIs. X: @zstmfhy

items.name: DGrid AI
items.description: AI compute and API service platform with multiple LLM proxy APIs. X: @dgrid_ai

items.name: oFox AI
items.description: AI proxy supporting multiple mainstream model APIs, clean and easy to use. X: @ooffooxx

items.name: FluxNode
items.description: AI proxy by Agent Reach author Neo, focused on Agent and coding scenarios.

items.name: Midjourney
items.description: One of the most popular AI image generators. V7 now supports video generation.

items.name: FLUX
items.description: Open-source image generation model by Black Forest Labs. Quality rivals commercial products.

items.name: Dreamina
items.description: ByteDance's AI image tool. Text-to-image and image-to-image with impressive results.

items.name: YouMind
items.description: AI mind map & knowledge management tool. Convert articles, webpages, PDFs into structured mind maps with AI-powered editing.

items.name: Seedance 2.0
items.description: ByteDance's AI dance/motion video generation model. High-quality human motion videos from text and image inputs.

items.name: Runway
items.description: Professional AI video generation and editing. Gen-3 produces high-quality text/image-to-video.

items.name: Kling
items.description: By Kuaishou. AI video generation with strong motion coherence.

items.name: Veo
items.description: Google DeepMind's video generation model with high visual quality and long video support.

items.name: HeyGen
items.description: AI digital human video platform — text-to-talking-head, video translation, and lip sync.

items.name: Suno
items.description: AI music generation platform — describe in text, get a complete song in multiple styles.

items.name: ElevenLabs
items.description: Most advanced AI voice synthesis — voice cloning, multilingual dubbing, ultra-realistic output.

items.name: ListenHub
items.description: AI podcast & audio tool — audio-to-text, smart summaries, multilingual translation for efficient audio consumption.

items.name: YouMind
items.description: AI mind map & knowledge tool — convert audio and video content into structured mind maps and notes.

items.name: NotebookLM
items.description: Google's AI notebook — upload docs, chat with content, one-click podcast generation.

items.name: Notion AI
items.description: Notion's built-in AI assistant for writing, summarizing, translating, and data analysis.

items.name: Gamma
items.description: AI presentation generator — one sentence to beautiful slides with custom templates and branding.

items.name: n8n
items.description: Open-source workflow automation — drag-and-drop to connect AI models and services.

items.name: Obsidian
items.description: Local-first knowledge management and note-taking tool with bidirectional links, Markdown editing, and a rich plugin ecosystem.
